What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Private Lessons with Rob (on a regular schedule), payment for all lessons in each month is due at the first lesson of each month, Make-ups are NOT guaranteed, weekly, alternate-weekly, or by week-to-week/intermittent scheduling

Today at Rob Jackson Studio Lesson + tuition board Student record - Ambrose K. Intake + lesson slot view Lesson schedule + showcase window Make-up + showcase follow-up Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Turn every contact-form inquiry into a booked new-student application and locked lesson slot
  • See monthly tuition paid / owed at the first-of-month mark without flipping through a paper ledger
  • Track make-up credits across weekly, alt-weekly, and week-to-week students so nothing slips
